title: createRenderEffect
description: Runs a function synchronously during render instead of queuing it. Used internally by the runtime; rarely needed in application code.
signature: createRenderEffect<Next, Init = Next>(fn: (v: Init | Next) => Next, value?: Init, options?: EffectOptions): void
param_fn_desc: Effect function. Runs immediately during render.
usage_reporting_state: The page writer's <0>Page</0> component reports its outputs to the parent as they change. A <1>createRenderEffect</1> reads the page snapshot and calls <2>props.onState</2> synchronously during render, so the parent ledger sees the first state before any queued effect runs.
info_ordering: Render effects run before user effects (<0>createEffect</0>). Use this when you need synchronous reactions during the render phase, such as component render tracking.
in_the_wild: See this effect stream page state to the parent in the <0>page-writer walkthrough</0>.
